creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
“Hidden gem” is such an overused term, but this tiny bar/restaurant in Copenhagen city centre is a bit of a hidden gem to be honest 🤠

There are definitely better places to get smørrebrød in Copenhagen, but if you’re looking for a very Danish experience and want to go to a place where you’re mainly rubbing shoulders with Danish people, Cafe Halvvejen is the place ✌️

#copenhagen #copenhagenfood #denmarktravel #danishfood
